name: Gio y Los Magos
tagline: Birria, asada, and the best quesatacos in Roseland — fresh off the grill at Santa Rosa’s Mitote Food Park.
seoDescription: Gio y Los Magos is a 4.7-star Mexican grill at Mitote Food Park in Santa Rosa, CA — famous for birria, asada tacos, birria fries, and quesatacos served fast in a friendly, casual setting.

contact.address: Mitote Food Park, 100 Sebastopol Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95407

sections.heading: The birria people cross town for
sections.subheading: Gio y Los Magos is the Roseland grill that turned a food-park stall into a 4.7-star destination — quesatacos and gordita de birria, asada and carnitas tacos, and birria fries piled high, all served fast by a team that’s genuinely glad you came.

sections.heading: A food-park stall with a serious following
body: At Santa Rosa’s Mitote Food Park, Gio y Los Magos has earned the kind of word-of-mouth that fills picnic tables — a 4.7-star reputation built on birria done right and tacos that come out fast and flavorful.

The draw is simple: bold, fresh Mexican plates, fair prices, and a warm, welcoming team. Regulars come for the quesatacos and the birria fries and stay for the easy, come-as-you-are vibe of the food park.

items.title: Birria & Quesatacos
items.description: The house specialty — rich, slow-cooked birria and crispy, cheesy quesatacos.

items.title: Asada & Carnitas Tacos
items.description: Carne asada and carnitas tacos served fast off the grill.

items.title: Birria Fries
items.description: Fries loaded with birria, cheese, and all the toppings.

items.title: Gordita de Birria
items.description: A handmade gordita stuffed with the same birria people drive in for.

items.title: Plates & Sides
items.description: Generous plates and classic sides to round out the meal.

items.title: Food-Park Dining
items.description: Order at the window and grab a picnic table at Mitote Food Park.

items.title: 4.7 stars and earned
items.body: A rating built on birria and tacos that deliver.

items.title: The birria is the thing
items.body: Quesatacos, fries, and gorditas all built on it.

items.title: Fast and friendly
items.body: Quick off the grill, served by a team glad you came.

items.title: Easy to find
items.body: At Mitote Food Park on Sebastopol Road in Roseland.

sections.heading: Hungry for real birria?
sections.body: Find Gio y Los Magos at Mitote Food Park, 100 Sebastopol Rd, Santa Rosa. Call (707) 393-9229.

items.a: At Mitote Food Park on Sebastopol Road in the Roseland area of Santa Rosa.
Birria — in tacos, quesatacos, gorditas, and loaded fries — plus asada and carnitas.
Yes — order at the window and grab a picnic table at the food park.
